description: SafeRoute AI Hyderabad knowledge base v2 — 79 curated, deduplicated, enriched places.

places.name: Golconda Fort

entry_fee.notes: Sound & Light Show charged separately. Entry fees may change.

opening_hours.notes: Sound & Light Show timings vary by season and language.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Cool temperatures, soft light for photography, smaller crowds.

time_windows.label: evening
time_windows.reason: Pleasant weather and Sound & Light Show experience.

places.best_time: October to February. Visit early morning or evening to avoid heat.
places.seasonal_notes: Best October to February. Summer afternoons are extremely hot. Monsoon can make stone steps slippery.
places.safety_notes: Wear non-slip footwear. Carry water. Granite steps are steep and can become slippery after rain. Climb to the summit is physically demanding.
places.accessibility_notes: Not wheelchair accessible. Requires climbing several hundred steps to reach the summit. Ground-level areas can still be explored.
places.short_description: Historic Qutb Shahi fort famous for its remarkable acoustic engineering, panoramic city views, and massive fortifications.

places.name: Charminar

entry_fee.notes: Free to photograph exterior. Entry fee applies for interior access. Fees may change.

opening_hours.notes: Interior access may be restricted during Friday prayers. Exterior remains viewable.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Soft light, manageable crowds, interior accessible.

time_windows.label: evening
time_windows.reason: Illuminated monument, vibrant bazaar atmosphere, excellent photography.

places.best_time: Morning for interior access and evening for illuminated views and market atmosphere.
places.seasonal_notes: Especially vibrant during Ramzan when the surrounding old city comes alive with lights, food stalls, and night markets.
places.safety_notes: Very crowded on weekends and evenings. Watch personal belongings in busy market areas. Interior staircases are steep and narrow.
places.accessibility_notes: Exterior is accessible. Interior upper levels require climbing steep spiral staircases and are not wheelchair accessible.
places.short_description: Hyderabad's most iconic monument, built in 1591 by Muhammad Quli Qutb Shah and surrounded by the historic old city markets.
highlights: Views of Mecca Masjid from upper levels

places.name: Qutb Shahi Tombs

entry_fee.notes: Entry fees may change.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Golden light on granite domes and fewer visitors.

places.best_time: Early morning for photography and peaceful exploration.
places.seasonal_notes: Most pleasant from October to February when gardens are lush and temperatures are comfortable.
places.safety_notes: Safe and well-maintained heritage site. Carry water during warmer months as shade is limited in some sections.
places.accessibility_notes: Mostly flat pathways. Wheelchair accessibility is possible in many areas, though some structures require steps.
places.short_description: Royal necropolis of the Qutb Shahi dynasty featuring monumental granite tombs, Persian-inspired architecture, and landscaped heritage gardens.
highlights: Royal tombs of the Qutb Shahi rulers
Conservation work led by the Aga Khan Trust for Culture

places.name: Chowmahalla Palace

entry_fee.notes: Photography and camera policies may change. Verify at entry.

opening_hours.notes: Last entry approximately 30 minutes before closing.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Comfortable temperatures and ideal lighting for courtyard photography.

places.best_time: Morning to early afternoon for photography and comfortable exploration.
places.seasonal_notes: Comfortable throughout the year. Summer afternoons can be warm in open courtyard areas.
places.safety_notes: Well-maintained heritage complex with security screening at entry. Keep personal belongings secure in crowded areas.
places.accessibility_notes: Main courtyards and ground-level sections are accessible. Some upper levels require stairs.
places.short_description: Historic palace of the Asaf Jahi Nizams featuring grand courtyards, royal halls, vintage automobiles, and Indo-European architectural influences.
highlights: Royal exhibits and memorabilia of the Asaf Jahi dynasty
Blend of Persian, Mughal, and European architecture

places.name: Salar Jung Museum
places.address: Salar Jung Rd, Darulshifa, Hyderabad, Telangana 500002

entry_fee.notes: Photography fees and exhibit photography permissions may vary.

opening_hours.notes: Holiday schedules may vary. Famous musical clock performs hourly.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Less crowded and allows sufficient time to explore major galleries.

places.best_time: Weekday mornings for a quieter museum experience.
places.seasonal_notes: Excellent year-round indoor attraction and ideal during hot weather or rain.
places.safety_notes: Well-managed museum with security screening and cloakroom facilities. Keep admission ticket until exit.
places.accessibility_notes: Wheelchair accessible with ramps and elevators connecting major galleries.
places.short_description: One of the world's largest collections assembled by a single individual, featuring thousands of artworks, artifacts, manuscripts, sculptures, and historical objects.
highlights: Famous musical clock performance every hour
Large collection of manuscripts, textiles, and weaponry
38 galleries covering multiple civilizations and eras

places.name: Mecca Masjid

entry_fee.notes: Free entry. Visitor access policies may vary. Respect religious guidelines and instructions from mosque authorities.

opening_hours.notes: Visitor access may be restricted during prayer times, especially on Fridays.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Calmer atmosphere and excellent lighting for appreciating the architecture.

places.best_time: Morning on non-Friday days for a quieter experience.
places.seasonal_notes: Especially atmospheric during Ramzan when the surrounding old city becomes a major center of religious and cultural activity.
places.safety_notes: Respect prayer times and religious practices. Dress modestly and follow instructions provided by mosque authorities.
places.accessibility_notes: Large open courtyard with generally accessible pathways. Some interior areas may involve steps.
places.short_description: One of India's largest historic mosques, commissioned by the Qutb Shahi rulers and known for its monumental granite construction and association with the old city of Hyderabad.
highlights: Bricks made using soil brought from Mecca
Tombs of members of the Asaf Jahi dynasty
Strong connection to Hyderabad's old city heritage

places.name: Taramati Baradari
places.address: Near Golconda Fort, Ibrahim Bagh, Hyderabad, Telangana 500008

entry_fee.notes: Entry fees and event pricing may vary depending on current management policies and scheduled events.

opening_hours.notes: Operating hours and event schedules may vary.

time_windows.label: evening
time_windows.reason: Pleasant weather and attractive sunset views.

places.seasonal_notes: Most enjoyable during cooler months from October to February.
places.safety_notes: Generally safe and less crowded. Follow designated pathways after sunset.
places.accessibility_notes: Mostly flat grounds with some uneven stone surfaces near heritage structures.
places.short_description: Historic Qutb Shahi-era pavilion associated with the legendary courtesan Taramati, offering heritage architecture and views toward the Golconda region.
highlights: Less crowded alternative to major attractions

places.safety_notes: Use designated boating facilities and wear provided safety equipment. Avoid isolated stretches late at night.
places.accessibility_notes: Promenade and public viewing areas are largely wheelchair accessible. Boat boarding may require assistance.
places.short_description: Historic artificial lake built in 1562 CE, famous for its massive monolithic Buddha statue, Tank Bund promenade, boating activities, and city skyline views.

entry_fee.notes: Free entry. Photography restrictions may apply inside temple premises.

places.safety_notes: Remove footwear before entering temple areas. Dress modestly and follow temple guidelines.
places.accessibility_notes: Temple is situated on a hill and involves climbing steps. Accessibility assistance and facilities may vary.
places.short_description: Prominent white marble temple dedicated to Lord Venkateswara, situated on Naubath Pahad and offering panoramic views of Hyderabad and Hussain Sagar Lake.

places.name: Purani Haveli

entry_fee.notes: Camera charges may apply. Fees subject to change.

opening_hours.notes: Museum timings may vary on public holidays.

time_windows.label: morning

places.safety_notes: Managed heritage site with good visitor facilities.
places.accessibility_notes: Ground floor accessible. Some upper sections require stairs.
places.short_description: Former Nizam residence turned heritage museum, famous for its wardrobe gallery, royal artifacts, vintage collections, and Indo-European palace architecture.

places.name: Paigah Tombs

time_windows.reason: Soft light highlights architectural details and carvings.

places.safety_notes: Visit during daylight hours. Quiet heritage area.

places.short_description: Remarkable 19th-century mausoleum complex of the Paigah nobility featuring some of Hyderabad's most intricate stone lattice work and Indo-Islamic funerary architecture.

places.name: Hayat Bakshi Begum Mosque

Easy addition to a Golconda itinerary

places.name: Khairatabad Ganesh Temple

entry_fee.notes: Free entry. During Ganesh Chaturthi queues can exceed several hours.

opening_hours.notes: Extended timings during Ganesh Chaturthi.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Peaceful darshan and morning rituals.

time_windows.label: evening
time_windows.reason: Temple illumination and evening aarti.

places.seasonal_notes: Ganesh Chaturthi (Aug–Sep) transforms the temple into one of Hyderabad's most visited religious sites.
places.safety_notes: Extremely crowded during Ganesh Chaturthi. Keep valuables secure and follow police crowd-control instructions.
places.accessibility_notes: Generally accessible. Festival season may reduce accessibility because of crowd barriers.
places.short_description: Hyderabad's most famous Ganesh temple, known nationwide for installing one of India's largest Ganesh idols during Ganesh Chaturthi.

places.name: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park

entry_fee.notes: Fees may change. Camera charges may apply.

time_windows.label: morning
time_windows.reason: Wildlife sightings and pleasant weather.

places.accessibility_notes: Mostly natural walking trails. Limited wheelchair accessibility.

places.name: Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge

entry_fee.notes: Bridge access free. Boating and activities at lake charged separately.

time_windows.reason: Sunset over the lake and skyline.

time_windows.label: night
time_windows.reason: Bridge lighting and skyline reflections.

places.seasonal_notes: Most photogenic after monsoon when water levels are high.
places.safety_notes: Well-lit and regularly patrolled. Can become crowded on weekends.
places.accessibility_notes: Fully wheelchair accessible with flat pathways.
places.short_description: Hyderabad's signature modern landmark — a cable-stayed bridge spanning Durgam Cheruvu with dramatic lighting, skyline views and a vibrant lakeside atmosphere.

places.name: Ameenpur Lake

opening_hours.notes: Best visited around sunrise.

time_windows.reason: Peak bird activity and best photography conditions.

opening_hours.notes: Best visited during daylight hours.

time_windows.reason: Best photography and pleasant temperatures.

places.seasonal_notes: Most scenic after monsoon when reservoir levels are high.

Excellent pairing with Shilparamam and Hitech City attractions
